rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft Hill Monastic Manuscript Library, St. John's Abbey and University Hill Monastic Manuscript Library, St. John's Abbey and University Hill Monastic Manuscript Library, St. John's Abbey and University, Akademie der Wissenschaften in Hamburg

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: Lexicon: ሐለለ - ፈደለ extended by the unmarked -ለወ segment starting with አለወ (mistake for ሀለወ) (), and further with segments on -ሉ, -ለየ, -ሊ, -ላ, -ሌ, -ሎ
Lexicon: ሐመመ - ፈጸመ extended by -መወ segment starting with ሐመወ (), -መየ segment starting with ሐመየ (), further segments for -ሙ, -ሚ, ማ-, ሜ, ም, ሞ
Lexicon: ሔሰ - ፈደሰ extended by -ሰወ segment starting with ሐሰወ (), -መየ segment starting with ሐሰየ (), further segments for -ሲ, ሳ-, ሴ, ስ, ሶ
Lexicon: ሖረ - ፈጠረ extended by -ረወ segment starting with ሐረወ (), further segment for -ሩ; ረየ segment starting with ኃረየ (); segments for ሪ, ራ, ር, ሮ
Lexicon: ሐልቀ - ፈሐቀ extended by -ቀወ segment starting with ነቀወ (), further segment for -ቁ; -ቀየ segment starting with ሐቀየ (); segments for ቃ, ቅ, ቆ
Lexicon: ሐሰበ - ጸግበ extended by -በወ segment starting with ለበወ (), further segment for -ቡ; -በየ segment starting with ተሐበየ (); segments for ቢ, ቤ, ብ, ቦ
Lexicon: ሐርበተ - ፈየተ extended by -ተወ segment starting with ሐተወ (), further segment for -ቱ; -ተየ segment starting with ሰትየ (); segments for ቲ, ታ, ት, ቶ
Lexicon: ሐበዘ - ገነዘ, extended by -ዘወ segment starting with ቤዘወ፡ (), -ዙ, -ዘየ segment starting with ሴዘየ (), -ዚ, -ዛ, -ዜ, ዝ
Lexicon: ሐውለየ - ጻሕየየ, -ዩ segment starting with ስልንዩ (), -ያ, -ይ, -ዮ starting with ሎጋዮ፡ ግምጃ፡
Lexicon: ሐመገ - አንጎገወ, extended by -ገወ segment containing only the word ጸገወ (), -ጉ, -ገየ starting with ሐገየ, -ጊ, -ጋ, - ጌ, -ግ, -ጎ segments
Lexicon: ሐጠ - ፈለጠ, extended by -ጠወ segment starting with መጠወ (), -ጡ, -ጠየ starting with ለጠየ, -ጢ, -ጣ, -ጤ, -ጥ, -ጦ segments
Lexicon: ሔጰ - ቀልጰጰ, very short (three lines only), continued by -ጰወ segment starting with አጸንጰወ (), very short segments for -ጵ, -ጳ
Lexicon: ሐረፀ - ገገጸ, continued by -ፀወ segment starting with ሐፀወ (), a very short segment for -ፁ, -ጸየ segment starting with ሐጸየ, segments for -ፂ, -ፃ, -ፄ, -ፅ, -ፆ
Lexicon: ሐለፈ - ጸረፈ, continued by -ፈወ segment starting with ሐፈወ (), a very short segment for -ፉ, -ፈየ segment starting with ሰፈየ (), segments for -ፉ, -ፊ, -ፋ, -ፌ
Another part of lexicon introduced as ዘተረስዓ፡ ነባር “Overlooked nabbār-forms”, arranged according to the last letter.
Lexicon ዘተረስዓ፡ ነባር, ሁ to ሆ, with various laryngeals
Lexicon ዘተረስዓ፡ ነባር, ሉ to ሎ, with various laryngeals
Lexicon ዘተረስዓ፡ ነባር, ቁ to ቆ
Lexicon ዘተረስዓ፡ ነባር, ሩ to ሮ
Lexicon ዘተረስዓ፡ ነባር, ቀ to ቆ
Lexicon ዘተረስዓ፡ ነባር, ቱ to ቶ
Lexicon ዘተረስዓ፡ ነባር, forms of the verb ሰብሐ and their conjugation and forms with object suffixes.
Lexicon, forms of the verbs ፈጸመ, ወገረ, ስእነ, ርእየ, ወደየ, ሀለየ, ክህለ, አርአየ, and others.
Thematic lexicon: ነገረ፡ ከተማ፡ ሰማይ፡, dedicated to the sky, sky bodies (the word ከተማ፡ must be a mistake) and sky phenomena,
Thematic lexicon: birds and animals (starting with ዖፍ፡ ዘ፡ ዖፍ)
Thematic lexicon: trade and travel (not indicated as subpart), encompassing several subtopics (maritime trips, measures and currency, cloths, travel)
On particles እስመ፡, በይነ፡, እንበይነ፡, በእንተ፡, ህይንተ፡, and others
On ንኡስ፡ አገባብ፡ ዘሰዋስው፡, mostly on ዲበ፡ and related words, ትሕተ፡, ውስተ፡, ወሂ፡, አይ፡
Lexicon for thematic classes of words and for various books
Thematic lexicon for the Book of Ezekiel
